hero.title: Building Scalable Web Applications and AI-Powered Systems
hero.intro: I'm a Full-Stack Software Engineer focused on building modern web applications, scalable backend systems, and intelligent AI-powered products. I enjoy turning complex problems into reliable and efficient software.

aiCapability.heading: AI Systems Development
aiCapability.subtitle: Designing and building intelligent systems powered by modern AI technologies.

items.title: RAG Systems
items.desc: Designing Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines that combine LLMs with vector databases to produce context-aware responses grounded in real data.

items.title: LLM Integration
items.desc: Integrating large language models such as OpenAI GPT and Google Gemini into web applications to enable automation, intelligent workflows, and AI-driven features.

items.title: AI Chatbots & Assistants
items.desc: Building conversational AI systems including chatbots and virtual assistants with multi-turn memory, personality cloning, and integrations with platforms like WhatsApp.

items.title: Knowledge Base Search
items.desc: Developing semantic search systems using vector embeddings to retrieve relevant knowledge quickly from large document collections.

grid.item1Title: Building scalable backend systems and modern web applications using technologies such as Go, Python, and Next.js.
grid.item2Title: Combining strong engineering principles with a thoughtful approach to user experience and visual design.
grid.item3Title: Comfortable collaborating across different time zones
grid.item6Title: Currently developing scalable full-stack applications focused on performance and reliability
grid.item7Title: Interested in starting a project together?

techStack.heading: Tech Stack
techStack.subtitle: A collection of technologies I frequently use to build scalable, maintainable, and high-performance applications

jobs.title: Programmer
jobs.desc: Developing backend services and enterprise-grade APIs using technologies such as Django REST Framework, Golang, Java Spring Boot, FastAPI, Flask, and NestJS.
achievements: Migrated and upgraded components of the KPEI e-CLEARS system using Java Spring Boot to support modern microservices architecture and Java 17+.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to build and enhance both internal and client-facing applications.
Performed data migration to support system upgrades and new deployments.
Diagnosed and resolved production issues while implementing new features to improve stability and performance.
Built internal business applications using Microsoft PowerApps to streamline workflows.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Web Developer (Freelance)
jobs.desc: Delivered custom web applications for clients across various industries, focusing on reliability, performance, and user-friendly experiences.
achievements: Projects Delivered: Barber Queue Management System, Skin Treatment Expert System, School E-Learning Platform, Tourism Booking Website.
Used modern web technologies such as React, Next.js, Node.js, Laravel, and Tailwind CSS to deliver production-ready solutions.

jobs.title: Intern
jobs.desc: Contributed to digital system development and modernization initiatives.
achievements: Built an information system for Soto Panaz including architecture design, database management, and UI implementation.
Migrated websites from WordPress to a modern stack using Next.js, Express.js, and Tailwind CSS.
Performed functional, integration, and performance testing while maintaining bug fixes.

degrees.description: Awarded a full academic scholarship for four years through a merit-based selection process. Actively involved in student organizations and served as a teaching assistant for Data Communication Networks and Web Programming.

certs.name: NestJS Zero to Hero - Modern TypeScript Back-end Development

items.title: Celestial Scroll - Novel Reader
items.des: A modern web-based reading platform for light novel readers featuring customizable reading experiences, optimized performance, and Progressive Web App support.
highlights: Developed with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS for a seamless reading experience
Implemented robust database management using Supabase and PostgreSQL
Optimized performance with caching strategies and PWA configuration for offline access

items.title: POS for UMKM Cemanting Art
items.des: A full-stack POS system designed to help small businesses manage transactions, financial records, and profit/loss reporting.
highlights: Built scalable REST API architecture using Node.js and Express.js
Designed relational database schema with MySQL to handle complex transactions and reporting
Implemented secure authentication and role-based access control for different user types

items.title: WhatsApp AI Chatbot with RAG
items.des: An intelligent backend system that clones a user's personality using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for personalized automated replies.
highlights: Engineered RAG pipeline using LangChain, OpenAI API, and Gemini AI for context-aware responses
Integrated Vector Database mapping user messages to retrieve relevant personality traits
Containerized application ensuring high scalability for concurrent WhatsApp webhooks

items.title: E-Learning School
items.des: An online learning platform featuring course material management, assignment tracking, and communication tools for students and teachers.
highlights: Created full-stack monolithic architecture using Laravel and PHP
Implemented Livewire for reactive frontend interfaces without complex JavaScript frameworks
Managed user roles, courses, and gradebook schemas backed by a MySQL database

approach.heading: Approach
approach.subtitle: A simple and structured process I follow to ensure every project is delivered efficiently and reliably.

phases.title: Planning & Analysis
phases.des: Understanding business goals, user needs, and project requirements before defining the system architecture and core features.

phases.title: Development
phases.des: Building the system through iterative development while maintaining clear communication and progress updates.

phases.title: Deployment & Launch
phases.des: Testing, optimizing performance, and preparing the system for production deployment.
